examples: By this time, Mark Antony had palled up with Cleopatra, Queen of Egypt, and Octavian beat both of them, and he became the sole ruler of the empire in 27 BCE.

She summons her page and sends Octavian the silver rose.
Octavian delivered up the tabloid version of an Egyptian queen, insatiable, treacherous and decadent.
In Octavian's version, Cleopatra assumed the role of the "wild queen, " lusting after Rome and plotting its destruction.
